Authors and Citation

Authors

  • JoonHo Lee. Author, maintainer, copyright holder.

Citation

Source: inst/CITATION

Lee J (2026). gradepath: Discrimination Report Cards via a Native Kline-Rose-Walters Core. R package version 0.5.0, https://github.com/joonho112/gradepath. 

@Manual{,
  title = {gradepath: Discrimination Report Cards via a Native Kline-Rose-Walters Core},
  author = {JoonHo Lee},
  year = {2026},
  note = {R package version 0.5.0},
  url = {https://github.com/joonho112/gradepath},
}

Kline P, Rose E, Walters C (2024). “A Discrimination Report Card.” American Economic Review, 114(8), 2472–2525. doi:10.1257/aer.20230700. 

@Article{,
  title = {A Discrimination Report Card},
  author = {Patrick Kline and Evan K. Rose and Christopher R. Walters},
  journal = {American Economic Review},
  year = {2024},
  volume = {114},
  number = {8},
  pages = {2472--2525},
  doi = {10.1257/aer.20230700},
}
